author: KHEDIM BENYAKHLEF dit BENY-JOE
description: Configuration avancée du Studio IA — Tous les paramètres modifiables

auth.description: Changez votre PIN dans render.yaml → ACCESS_PIN

styles.cinematique: epic cinematic orchestral, dramatic strings, powerful brass, Hans Zimmer style
styles.ambiante: peaceful ambient, soft piano, atmospheric pads, calm, Brian Eno style
styles.cyberpunk: dark synthwave, futuristic industrial beats, neon, driving bass
styles.nature: acoustic guitar, birds, gentle rain, folk instrumental, relaxing
styles.scifi: space ambient, ethereal pads, cosmic, futuristic synthesizers
styles.noir: jazz saxophone, trumpet, rainy night, 1940s detective, moody
styles.fantasy: magical orchestral, choir, enchanted forest, mystical harps, epic
styles.horror: dissonant strings, tension, suspense, eerie, terrifying atmosphere
styles.epic_battle: powerful timpani, war horns, intense strings, triumphant brass
styles.romantique: romantic violin solo, gentle piano, emotional, tender, love theme

negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, bad anatomy, deformed, ugly, duplicate, error, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, cartoon, flat colors, overexposed, underexposed, noise, grainy

style_suffixes.cinematic: cinematic lighting, anamorphic lens, film grain, 4K HDR
style_suffixes.cyberpunk: neon lights, rain-soaked streets, volumetric fog, 8K
style_suffixes.epic_battle: fire and smoke, dramatic sky, hyperrealistic, 8K
style_suffixes.nature: golden hour, misty mountains, cinematic grade, 4K
style_suffixes.scifi: zero gravity, distant nebula, sci-fi tech, cinematic
style_suffixes.noir: black and white, smoky atmosphere, dramatic shadows, 1940s
style_suffixes.horror: fog, moonlight, dark atmosphere, ultra realistic
style_suffixes.romantique: warm bokeh, soft light, golden hour, dreamy, 4K

render.note: Le plan gratuit Render s'endort après 15 min d'inactivité. Premier chargement = 30s d'attente.
